creator: chris@bayofrum.net
text:
Ah, I've investigated and it turns out the problem is using SUB_LIST= 
WWWDIR=${WWWDIR}, which gives an absolute path rather than PREFIX_REL 
path. Since WWWDIR is in PLIST_SUB anyway I've just chopped that line 
out and added the missing man page to MAN8.

Should be committed later if it passes testing!

Chris

--
